src: WinToast is a lightly library written in C++ which brings a complete integration of the modern toast notifications of Windows 8 & Windows 10.  Toast notifications allows your app to inform the users about relevant information and timely events that they should see and take action upon inside your app, such as a new instant message, a new friend request, breaking news, or a calendar event.
ja: WinToastはC++で書かれた軽量ライブラリ。Windows 8・Windows 10のモダントースト通知を完全統合し、新着メッセージ、友達リクエスト、速報、カレンダーイベントなどをアプリ内でユーザーに通知できる
